Index.title: Build the future of AI with Melaris
Index.subtitle: A premium, dark futuristic SaaS platform built for modern AI startups. Scalable, multilingual, and stunning.

Pricing.Title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.Subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.
Pricing.Free_desc: Perfect to get started and explore the platform.
Pricing.Premium_desc: Unlock the full potential of Melaris AI tools.
Pricing.Supporter_desc: Support the project and get exclusive perks.

Marketing.title: The Ultimate AI Ecosystem
Marketing.subtitle: Unlock 15+ next-generation AI tools. From Content Creation to Gaming and Education, step into the future of productivity.
Marketing.card_categories_desc: Explore categories like Fortnite, Content Creation, Discord Tools, and Real Life Hacks.
Marketing.card_labs_desc: Test highly unstable, next-gen AI features before they are released to the public.
Marketing.card_roadmap_desc: Vote on upcoming features, track development progress, and shape the future of Melaris.

Dashboard.title: Melaris Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to the next-generation AI ecosystem. Explore our active tools, vote on the roadmap, and discover the future of content creation and gaming.

minecraft_story_map_generator.title: Minecraft Story Map Generator
minecraft_story_map_generator.description: Minecraft map generator based on a written story.
minecraft_story_map_generator.tooltip: Uses LLMs to parse narrative arcs into command block sequences and world generation seeds.

minecraft_rp_quest_ai.title: Minecraft RP Quest AI
minecraft_rp_quest_ai.description: AI that automatically creates Minecraft RP quests.
minecraft_rp_quest_ai.tooltip: Dynamically generates lore-accurate NPCs, dialogue trees, and objectives.

hd_minecraft_skin_ai.title: HD Minecraft Skin AI
hd_minecraft_skin_ai.description: AI that transforms a Minecraft skin into a realistic HD skin.
hd_minecraft_skin_ai.tooltip: Uses diffusion models to upscale 64x64 pixel art into high-res 3D textures.

minecraft_build_to_tutorial.title: Minecraft Build to Tutorial
minecraft_build_to_tutorial.description: Turns screenshots of Minecraft builds into a step-by-step tutorial.
minecraft_build_to_tutorial.tooltip: Vision AI analyzes block placement layers to generate a block-by-block guide.

roblox_lua_assistant.title: Roblox Lua Assistant
roblox_lua_assistant.description: Roblox Studio assistant that automatically fixes Lua scripts.
roblox_lua_assistant.tooltip: Trained on the Roblox API to debug and optimize Luau code.

discord_to_wiki.title: Discord to Wiki
discord_to_wiki.description: Site that transforms a gaming Discord server into an automatic wiki.
discord_to_wiki.tooltip: Scrapes pinned messages and FAQ channels to build a searchable knowledge base.

discord_event_creator.title: Discord Event Creator
discord_event_creator.description: Automatic event creator for Discord servers.
discord_event_creator.tooltip: Analyzes server activity to propose and schedule community events.

funny_discord_summarizer.title: Funny Discord Summarizer
funny_discord_summarizer.description: IA that transforms Discord conversations into a funny summary.
funny_discord_summarizer.tooltip: Uses NLP to extract inside jokes and key moments from a chat history.

gaming_thumbnail_ai.title: Gaming Thumbnail AI
gaming_thumbnail_ai.description: IA that creates gaming YouTube thumbnails coherent with gameplay.
gaming_thumbnail_ai.tooltip: Extracts the most action-packed frames and applies CTR-optimized styling.

custom_fortnite_challenges.title: Custom Fortnite Challenges
custom_fortnite_challenges.description: IA that proposes personalized Fortnite challenges.
custom_fortnite_challenges.tooltip: Generates rule sets and drop locations for your next stream.

gaming_inspiration_assistant.title: Gaming Inspiration Assistant
gaming_inspiration_assistant.description: "Anti lack of inspiration" assistant for gaming creators.
gaming_inspiration_assistant.tooltip: Cross-references trending games with your channel style to suggest content.

npc_dialogue_generator.title: NPC Dialogue Generator
npc_dialogue_generator.description: IA that automatically generates NPC dialogues.
npc_dialogue_generator.tooltip: Connects to a local LLM to generate context-aware branching dialogue trees.

ultra_short_notes_generator.title: Ultra-Short Notes Generator
ultra_short_notes_generator.description: Generator of ultra-short summary sheets for middle schoolers.
ultra_short_notes_generator.tooltip: Simplifies complex concepts into 3 bullet points max.

pdf_to_quiz.title: PDF to Quiz
pdf_to_quiz.description: Site that transforms a PDF into an interactive quiz.
pdf_to_quiz.tooltip: Extracts key facts and generates multiple-choice questions.

homework_explainer_ai.title: Homework Explainer AI
homework_explainer_ai.description: IA that explains homework at a middle/high school level.
homework_explainer_ai.tooltip: Socratic method AI that guides the student without giving direct answers.

auto_mind_maps.title: Auto Mind Maps
auto_mind_maps.description: IA that creates automatic mind maps.
auto_mind_maps.tooltip: Parses text to build visual node-based relationship maps.

lesson_to_interactive_game.title: Lesson to Interactive Game
lesson_to_interactive_game.description: Site that transforms a lesson into an interactive game.
lesson_to_interactive_game.tooltip: Generates web-based mini-games based on historical facts or math formulas.

auto_test_creator.title: Auto Test Creator
auto_test_creator.description: Site that creates school tests automatically.
auto_test_creator.tooltip: Generates balanced exams with varying difficulty levels.

photo_to_mcq.title: Photo to MCQ
photo_to_mcq.tooltip: Uses Vision AI to read textbook pages and generate questions.

adhd_dyslexia_rewriter.title: ADHD/Dyslexia Rewriter
adhd_dyslexia_rewriter.description: IA that rewrites courses for ADHD/dyslexia.
adhd_dyslexia_rewriter.tooltip: Applies bionic reading and breaks walls of text into digestible parts.

auto_file_organizer.title: Auto File Organizer
auto_file_organizer.tooltip: Sorts your desktop and documents based on content analysis.

idea_to_30_shorts.title: Idea to 30 Shorts
idea_to_30_shorts.description: Site that transforms an idea into 30 Shorts scripts.
idea_to_30_shorts.tooltip: Applies viral hook frameworks to generate a month of content.

meta_creator_assistant.title: Meta Creator Assistant
meta_creator_assistant.description: Assistant that creates coherent thumbnails + titles + hashtags.
meta_creator_assistant.tooltip: SEO and CTR optimized package generation.

infinite_youtube_ideas.title: Infinite YouTube Ideas
infinite_youtube_ideas.description: Infinite YouTube ideas generator by niche.
infinite_youtube_ideas.tooltip: Analyzes your audience overlap to find untapped topics.

tiktok_trend_assistant.title: TikTok Trend Assistant
tiktok_trend_assistant.description: TikTok assistant based on real-time trends.
tiktok_trend_assistant.tooltip: Scrapes trending audio and formats before they peak.

optimized_yt_descriptions.title: Optimized YT Descriptions
optimized_yt_descriptions.description: Site that generates optimized YouTube descriptions.
optimized_yt_descriptions.tooltip: Includes timestamps, SEO keywords, and affiliate link formatting.

viral_potential_predictor.title: Viral Potential Predictor
viral_potential_predictor.description: IA that predicts the viral potential of a video.
viral_potential_predictor.tooltip: Analyzes pacing, retention curves, and hook strength.

auto_content_calendar.title: Auto Content Calendar
auto_content_calendar.description: Site that creates an automatic content calendar.
auto_content_calendar.tooltip: Distributes content pillars across the week for maximum reach.

room_setup_organizer_ai.title: Room/Setup Organizer AI
room_setup_organizer_ai.description: IA that helps organize a room or gaming setup.
room_setup_organizer_ai.tooltip: Upload a photo and get a 3D overlay of optimal furniture placement.

fridge_to_recipes.title: Fridge to Recipes
fridge_to_recipes.description: Site that transforms a photo of a fridge into recipes.
fridge_to_recipes.tooltip: Identifies ingredients and suggests meals based on what you have.

family_organizer_assistant.title: Family Organizer Assistant
family_organizer_assistant.tooltip: Syncs schedules and gamifies chores for kids.

custom_routine_ai.title: Custom Routine AI
custom_routine_ai.tooltip: Adapts to your chronotype and energy levels.

goals_to_mini_missions.title: Goals to Mini-Missions
goals_to_mini_missions.description: Site that transforms objectives into mini missions.
goals_to_mini_missions.tooltip: Applies RPG mechanics to real-life productivity.

ultra_simplified_travel_ai.title: Ultra-Simplified Travel AI
ultra_simplified_travel_ai.tooltip: Generates day-by-day itineraries based on vibe and budget.

auto_list_generator.title: Auto List Generator
auto_list_generator.tooltip: Packing lists, grocery lists, all generated from context.

budget_weekend_planner.title: Budget Weekend Planner
budget_weekend_planner.description: IA that plans a weekend according to budget.
budget_weekend_planner.tooltip: Finds activities and travel options strictly within limits.

goal_progression_tree.title: Goal Progression Tree
goal_progression_tree.description: IA that transforms objectives into a progression tree.
goal_progression_tree.tooltip: Visual skill tree mapping for personal development.

budget_family_menus.title: Budget Family Menus
budget_family_menus.description: IA that creates menus according to family budget.

friend_challenges.title: Friend Challenges
friend_challenges.description: Site that generates challenges between friends.
friend_challenges.tooltip: Customized dares and bets based on friend group dynamics.

story_character_ai.title: Story Character AI
story_character_ai.description: IA that creates coherent characters for stories.
story_character_ai.tooltip: Maintains character bibles with deep psychological profiles.

song_to_visual_universe.title: Song to Visual Universe
song_to_visual_universe.description: Site that transforms a song into a visual universe.
song_to_visual_universe.tooltip: Analyzes lyrics and stems to generate a moodboard and lore.

text_to_rpg_quest.title: Text to RPG Quest
text_to_rpg_quest.description: Site that transforms text into an RPG quest.
text_to_rpg_quest.tooltip: Playable text adventures generated from any prompt.

simple_conlang_gen.title: Simple Conlang Gen
simple_conlang_gen.tooltip: Creates phonology, vocabulary, and grammar rules for worldbuilding.
